originalAlarm.description: Value stored to 'wakeup' is never read

reasoning: 36855dcfc98.c L6: 'wakeup=0' dead store inside !CONFIG_BF60x block, never read (known VBDB bug). PC=CONFIG_BF60x=F correctly constrains when this code path is compiled. Known bug. Correctly constrained PC. Consistent with TRANSFORMATION_50 (TRUE).
